title: CPO adoption pace and deployment challenges

paragraphs.source: Nvidia’s first CPO products will be for backend scale out switches with their InfiniBand CPO available in 2H 2025 and Ethernet CPO switch available in H2 2026. We think this initial phase will primarily serve as a market test and a preparatory phase to bring up supply chain maturity. We expect total shipment volume to range from 10-15k units in 2026.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Nvidia’s first CPO products will be for backend scale out switches with their InfiniBand CPO available in 2H 2025 and Ethernet CPO switch available in H2 2026. We think this initial phase will primarily serve as a market test and a preparatory phase to bring up supply chain maturity. We expect total shipment volume to range from 10-15k units in 2026.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Nvidia’s first CPO products will be for backend scale out switches with their InfiniBand CPO available in 2H 2025 and Ethernet CPO switch available in H2 2026. We think this initial phase will primarily serve as a market test and a preparatory phase to bring up supply chain maturity. We expect total shipment volume to range from 10-15k units in 2026.

pro.text: 英伟达首款共封装光学（CPO）产品将用于后端横向扩展交换机，其InfiniBand CPO预计于2025年下半年推出，以太网CPO交换机则于2026年下半年推出。我们认为这一初始阶段主要作为市场测试，并为供应链成熟度提升做好准备。预计2026年总出货量将在1万至1.5万台之间。

paragraphs.source: There will have to be a more compelling rationale for adopting CPO for deployments to advance further and faster and become truly ubiquitous. Two possibilities could be a dramatic total cost of ownership advantage from adopting CPO, or if the electrical LR SerDes needed to drive the signal from the switch ASIC to the front panel of a switch box hits a hard speed or range wall.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: There will have to be a more compelling rationale for adopting CPO for deployments to advance further and faster and become truly ubiquitous. Two possibilities could be a dramatic total cost of ownership advantage from adopting CPO, or if the electrical LR SerDes needed to drive the signal from the switch ASIC to the front panel of a switch box hits a hard speed or range wall.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: There will have to be a more compelling rationale for adopting CPO for deployments to advance further and faster and become truly ubiquitous. Two possibilities could be a dramatic total cost of ownership advantage from adopting CPO, or if the electrical LR SerDes needed to drive the signal from the switch ASIC to the front panel of a switch box hits a hard speed or range wall.

pro.text: 要让CPO部署进一步加速并真正实现普及，必须有更具说服力的采用理由。两种可能性包括：采用CPO能带来显著的总体拥有成本（TCO）优势，或者驱动交换机ASIC信号至机箱前面板的电气长距离SerDes遇到硬速度或距离墙（I/O wall）。

paragraphs.source: Offsetting any TCO benefits are two major things that datacenter operators dislike about deploying CPO-based systems: the lack of interoperability and serviceability challenges.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Offsetting any TCO benefits are two major things that datacenter operators dislike about deploying CPO-based systems: the lack of interoperability and serviceability challenges.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Offsetting any TCO benefits are two major things that datacenter operators dislike about deploying CPO-based systems: the lack of interoperability and serviceability challenges.

pro.text: 任何TCO优势都会被数据中心运营商对CPO系统的两大顾虑所抵消：缺乏互操作性以及可维护性挑战。

paragraphs.source: The challenges of CPO extend to outside the package and into the whole system. Managing fibers, front plate density, external lasers are all essential parts that are challenges. To enable CPO the chip company needs to provide an end-to-end solution which the customer can deploy. This is a continuation of the trend we are seeing, especially with Nvidia, who is focused on system design to scale performance.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The challenges of CPO extend to outside the package and into the whole system. Managing fibers, front plate density, external lasers are all essential parts that are challenges. To enable CPO the chip company needs to provide an end-to-end solution which the customer can deploy. This is a continuation of the trend we are seeing, especially with Nvidia, who is focused on system design to scale performance.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The challenges of CPO extend to outside the package and into the whole system. Managing fibers, front plate density, external lasers are all essential parts that are challenges. To enable CPO the chip company needs to provide an end-to-end solution which the customer can deploy. This is a continuation of the trend we are seeing, especially with Nvidia, who is focused on system design to scale performance.

pro.text: CPO的挑战不仅限于封装内部，还延伸至整个系统。光纤管理、前面板密度、外部激光器等都是需要面对的重要挑战。要真正启用CPO，芯片公司需要提供客户可直接部署的端到端解决方案。这也是我们观察到的趋势的延续，尤其是英伟达，正专注于系统设计以实现性能扩展。

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**

paragraphs.source: 1. Is typically handled by the OIF (Optical Internetworking Forum), 2. is typically handled by IEEE (and sometimes the OIF). IEEE plays a central role through its IEEE 802.3 standard, which defines the Ethernet Physical Medium Dependent (PMD) layers. These specifications cover key parameters such as modulation formats, lane speeds, lane counts, reach and media types, and wavelengths for optical signals. By conforming to these standardized PMDs, transceivers from different vendors can operate interchangeably, ensuring true plug-and-play compatibility across a multi-vendor ecosystem, 3. and is typically handled by MSAs (Multi-Source Agreements). MSAs define specialized solutions and ensure multi-vendor interoperability outside of official IEEE standards.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: 1. Is typically handled by the OIF (Optical Internetworking Forum), 2. is typically handled by IEEE (and sometimes the OIF). IEEE plays a central role through its IEEE 802.3 standard, which defines the Ethernet Physical Medium Dependent (PMD) layers. These specifications cover key parameters such as modulation formats, lane speeds, lane counts, reach and media types, and wavelengths for optical signals. By conforming to these standardized PMDs, transceivers from different vendors can operate interchangeably, ensuring true plug-and-play compatibility across a multi-vendor ecosystem, 3. and is typically handled by MSAs (Multi-Source Agreements). MSAs define specialized solutions and ensure multi-vendor interoperability outside of official IEEE standards.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: 1. Is typically handled by the OIF (Optical Internetworking Forum), 2. is typically handled by IEEE (and sometimes the OIF). IEEE plays a central role through its IEEE 802.3 standard, which defines the Ethernet Physical Medium Dependent (PMD) layers. These specifications cover key parameters such as modulation formats, lane speeds, lane counts, reach and media types, and wavelengths for optical signals. By conforming to these standardized PMDs, transceivers from different vendors can operate interchangeably, ensuring true plug-and-play compatibility across a multi-vendor ecosystem, 3. and is typically handled by MSAs (Multi-Source Agreements). MSAs define specialized solutions and ensure multi-vendor interoperability outside of official IEEE standards.

pro.text: 1. 通常由OIF（Optical Internetworking Forum，光互联网络论坛）负责；2. 通常由IEEE（有时也包括OIF）负责。IEEE通过其IEEE 802.3标准发挥核心作用，该标准定义了以太网物理介质相关（PMD）层。这些规范涵盖调制格式、通道速率、通道数量、传输距离、介质类型以及光信号波长等关键参数。通过遵循这些标准化的PMD，不同厂商的光模块可以互换使用，从而在多厂商生态系统中实现真正的即插即用兼容性；3. 通常由MSA（Multi-Source Agreements，多源协议）负责。MSA定义了特定解决方案，并在官方IEEE标准之外确保多厂商互操作性。

paragraphs.source: 1. It’s critical that CPO modules be compliant electrically, as otherwise they cannot speak with state-of-the-art SerDes. 2. Compatibility on optical is helpful because it can then be compatible with standard pluggables elsewhere in the cluster. 3. It is important to understand that CPO is in the “wild west” phase, with some solutions and architectural decisions leading towards completely proprietary form factors. This is what the new OIF high-density interconnect efforts (such as the CPX paradigm) are trying to address.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: 1. It’s critical that CPO modules be compliant electrically, as otherwise they cannot speak with state-of-the-art SerDes. 2. Compatibility on optical is helpful because it can then be compatible with standard pluggables elsewhere in the cluster. 3. It is important to understand that CPO is in the “wild west” phase, with some solutions and architectural decisions leading towards completely proprietary form factors. This is what the new OIF high-density interconnect efforts (such as the CPX paradigm) are trying to address.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: 1. It’s critical that CPO modules be compliant electrically, as otherwise they cannot speak with state-of-the-art SerDes. 2. Compatibility on optical is helpful because it can then be compatible with standard pluggables elsewhere in the cluster. 3. It is important to understand that CPO is in the “wild west” phase, with some solutions and architectural decisions leading towards completely proprietary form factors. This is what the new OIF high-density interconnect efforts (such as the CPX paradigm) are trying to address.

pro.text: CPO模块必须在电气上保持合规，否则将无法与最先进的SerDes进行通信。光学层面的兼容性很有帮助，因为这样它才能与集群内其他位置的标准可插拔模块兼容。必须认识到，CPO目前仍处于“西部蛮荒”阶段，一些解决方案和架构决策正导向完全专有的外形规格。这正是新的OIF高密度互连工作（如CPX范式）试图解决的问题。

paragraphs.source: However, at this moment, CPO is not yet embracing standards to the same extent that puggables are and cannot yet guarantee interoperability to extent optical transceivers can. Part of the challenge is that vendors are pushing system level solutions rather than selling the silicon alone to the box makers. This is because the challenges of CPO extend to outside the package and into the whole system. Managing fibers, front plate density, modulator architecture and external lasers are all essential parts that are challenges. To bootstrap CPO adoption, companies like Nvidia need to start by providing an end-to-end solution.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: However, at this moment, CPO is not yet embracing standards to the same extent that puggables are and cannot yet guarantee interoperability to extent optical transceivers can. Part of the challenge is that vendors are pushing system level solutions rather than selling the silicon alone to the box makers. This is because the challenges of CPO extend to outside the package and into the whole system. Managing fibers, front plate density, modulator architecture and external lasers are all essential parts that are challenges. To bootstrap CPO adoption, companies like Nvidia need to start by providing an end-to-end solution.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: However, at this moment, CPO is not yet embracing standards to the same extent that puggables are and cannot yet guarantee interoperability to extent optical transceivers can. Part of the challenge is that vendors are pushing system level solutions rather than selling the silicon alone to the box makers. This is because the challenges of CPO extend to outside the package and into the whole system. Managing fibers, front plate density, modulator architecture and external lasers are all essential parts that are challenges. To bootstrap CPO adoption, companies like Nvidia need to start by providing an end-to-end solution.

pro.text: 然而，目前CPO对标准的拥抱程度仍远不及可插拔模块，也无法像光学收发器那样保证互操作性。部分挑战在于，供应商更多地在推动系统级解决方案，而不是单独向设备厂商出售硅芯片。这是因为CPO的挑战不仅限于封装内部，还延伸至整个系统。光纤管理、前面板密度、调制器架构以及外部激光器都是必须应对的关键难题。要真正启动CPO采用，英伟达等公司需要首先提供端到端的完整解决方案。

paragraphs.source: One approach to this end could be to adopt standardized solutions at the component level where co-packaged OEs followed a standardized fiber interface with photonic components—such as lasers, modulators, and photodiodes—that align with Ethernet standards or MSAs for wavelength, speed, and modulation. This would enable true interoperability, letting customers mix and match products from various vendors without having to source all their equipment from one vendor. If OEs are socketable, operators could easily swap them out in the case of failure. Such standardization would also create a more competitive and robust multi-vendor market that could drive down costs for customers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: One approach to this end could be to adopt standardized solutions at the component level where co-packaged OEs followed a standardized fiber interface with photonic components—such as lasers, modulators, and photodiodes—that align with Ethernet standards or MSAs for wavelength, speed, and modulation. This would enable true interoperability, letting customers mix and match products from various vendors without having to source all their equipment from one vendor. If OEs are socketable, operators could easily swap them out in the case of failure. Such standardization would also create a more competitive and robust multi-vendor market that could drive down costs for customers. It would also allow customers to choose various vendors based on lead times, prices, or unique features without being beholden to one vendor.

This would enable true interoperability, letting customers mix and match products from various vendors without having to source all their equipment from one vendor. If OEs are socketable, operators could easily swap them out in the case of failure. Such standardization would also create a more competitive and robust multi-vendor market that could drive down costs for customers. It would also allow customers to choose various vendors based on lead times, prices, or unique features without being beholden to one vendor.

pro.text: 实现这一目标的一种方法是在组件层面采用标准化方案，让共封装光学器件遵循标准化的光纤接口，并使用符合以太网标准或MSA的激光器、调制器和光电二极管等光子组件，在波长、速率和调制方式上保持一致。这将实现真正的互操作性，让客户能够混合搭配不同供应商的产品，而无需从单一供应商处采购全部设备。如果光学引擎采用可插座式设计，运营商在出现故障时就能轻松更换。这种标准化还将催生更具竞争力和稳健性的多供应商市场，最终为客户降低成本。

paragraphs.source: An issue that must be addressed before CPO can be widely adopted comes from fiber coupling. Connecting fiber to a silicon photonics device in a pluggable optical module is relatively straightforward, whereas coupling fiber to an optical engine for CPO is much more challenging. In CPO systems, fibers must be precisely aligned with sub-micron accuracy to couple light into very small waveguides (often submicron in both width and height) on the chip, while pluggables present less hassle as they use pre-aligned, standardized connectors. Furthermore, in CPO based systems, fiber coupling happens within the cramped and thermally active switch chassis, unlike pluggables where the fiber coupling happens far away from the device’s main package.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: An issue that must be addressed before CPO can be widely adopted comes from fiber coupling. Connecting fiber to a silicon photonics device in a pluggable optical module is relatively straightforward, whereas coupling fiber to an optical engine for CPO is much more challenging. In CPO systems, fibers must be precisely aligned with sub-micron accuracy to couple light into very small waveguides (often submicron in both width and height) on the chip, while pluggables present less hassle as they use pre-aligned, standardized connectors. Furthermore, in CPO based systems, fiber coupling happens within the cramped and thermally active switch chassis, unlike pluggables where the fiber coupling happens far away from the device’s main package.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: An issue that must be addressed before CPO can be widely adopted comes from fiber coupling. Connecting fiber to a silicon photonics device in a pluggable optical module is relatively straightforward, whereas coupling fiber to an optical engine for CPO is much more challenging. In CPO systems, fibers must be precisely aligned with sub-micron accuracy to couple light into very small waveguides (often submicron in both width and height) on the chip, while pluggables present less hassle as they use pre-aligned, standardized connectors. Furthermore, in CPO based systems, fiber coupling happens within the cramped and thermally active switch chassis, unlike pluggables where the fiber coupling happens far away from the device’s main package.

pro.text: 在CPO被广泛采用之前，必须解决的一个问题来自光纤耦合。在可插拔光学模块中，将光纤连接到硅光子器件相对简单；而将光纤耦合到CPO的光引擎则困难得多。在CPO系统中，光纤必须以亚微米级精度精确对准，才能将光耦合到芯片上极小的波导中。这些波导的宽度和高度通常均为亚微米级。相比之下，可插拔模块使用预先对准的标准连接器，操作难度要小得多。此外，CPO系统的光纤耦合发生在空间狭小且热活动频繁的交换机机箱内，而可插拔模块的光纤耦合则远离器件的主封装。

paragraphs.source: While copper-based electrical communication suffers from inferior insertion loss and signal integrity when compared to optical, copper is generally reliable in other ways. Optical devices are inherently temperature sensitive. Changes in operating temperature can alter laser wavelengths, reduce component efficiency, and negatively affect reliability, often requiring specialized temperature control or calibration mechanisms. Additionally, photonic components also naturally degrade over time, gradually losing optical efficiency due to aging, contamination, or mechanical stress, further challenging long-term reliability.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: While copper-based electrical communication suffers from inferior insertion loss and signal integrity when compared to optical, copper is generally reliable in other ways. Optical devices are inherently temperature sensitive. Changes in operating temperature can alter laser wavelengths, reduce component efficiency, and negatively affect reliability, often requiring specialized temperature control or calibration mechanisms. Additionally, photonic components also naturally degrade over time, gradually losing optical efficiency due to aging, contamination, or mechanical stress, further challenging long-term reliability. Environmental factors, such as dust, humidity, and mechanical disturbances, disproportionately impact optical systems, which are more vulnerable than copper-based electrical links.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: While copper-based electrical communication suffers from inferior insertion loss and signal integrity when compared to optical, copper is generally reliable in other ways. Optical devices are inherently temperature sensitive. Changes in operating temperature can alter laser wavelengths, reduce component efficiency, and negatively affect reliability, often requiring specialized temperature control or calibration mechanisms. Additionally, photonic components also naturally degrade over time, gradually losing optical efficiency due to aging, contamination, or mechanical stress, further challenging long-term reliability. Environmental factors, such as dust, humidity, and mechanical disturbances, disproportionately impact optical systems, which are more vulnerable than copper-based electrical links.

pro.text: 虽然基于铜的电通信在插入损耗和信号完整性方面不如光学通信，但铜在其他方面通常更为可靠。光学器件本质上对温度敏感。工作温度的变化会改变激光波长、降低组件效率，并对可靠性产生负面影响，通常需要专门的温度控制或校准机制。此外，光子组件还会随着时间自然退化，由于老化、污染或机械应力而逐渐失去光学效率，进一步挑战长期可靠性。

paragraphs.source: These environmental and operational challenges extend directly to the physical fibers themselves. Fiber performance is highly sensitive to physical disturbances, particularly bending, which not only increases optical insertion loss but also accelerates breakages and failures. In a chassis containing multiple fiber arrays—typically two per engine, one for the connector and one from the ELS for the light source—each array must be routed with strict topological considerations. Every individual fiber link requires a unique length, accounting for variations in the distance from the faceplate to each optical engine and the routing constraints imposed by adjacent arrays.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: These environmental and operational challenges extend directly to the physical fibers themselves. Fiber performance is highly sensitive to physical disturbances, particularly bending, which not only increases optical insertion loss but also accelerates breakages and failures. In a chassis containing multiple fiber arrays—typically two per engine, one for the connector and one from the ELS for the light source—each array must be routed with strict topological considerations. Every individual fiber link requires a unique length, accounting for variations in the distance from the faceplate to each optical engine and the routing constraints imposed by adjacent arrays.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: These environmental and operational challenges extend directly to the physical fibers themselves. Fiber performance is highly sensitive to physical disturbances, particularly bending, which not only increases optical insertion loss but also accelerates breakages and failures. In a chassis containing multiple fiber arrays—typically two per engine, one for the connector and one from the ELS for the light source—each array must be routed with strict topological considerations. Every individual fiber link requires a unique length, accounting for variations in the distance from the faceplate to each optical engine and the routing constraints imposed by adjacent arrays.

pro.text: 这些环境和操作挑战直接延伸到物理光纤本身。光纤性能对物理扰动极为敏感，尤其是弯曲，不仅会增加光学插入损耗，还会加速断裂和故障。在包含多个光纤阵列的机箱中——通常每个光学引擎对应两组，一组用于连接器，另一组来自ELS作为光源——每个阵列的布线都必须严格考虑拓扑结构。每条独立的光纤链路都需要独特的长度，以适应从面板到每个光学引擎的不同距离，以及相邻阵列带来的布线限制。

paragraphs.source: We can see in the close-up image of the Quantum-X CPO switch below that the fiber ribbons coming out of the OEs need to be routed through the fiber cassettes to manage the fiber properly. FAUs are detachable to provision for breakages that need replacing. But the more complicated routing of fiber within the switch means that fiber/FAU replacement is far more onerous than replacing a broken pluggable transceiver which is simply a hot swap at the front of the face plate. In the case of the CPO switch, the engineer will need to go inside the box/chassis, remove the broken FAU, and then properly re-attach the new FAU through the cassette. This needs to be done without disturbing the other fibers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: We can see in the close-up image of the Quantum-X CPO switch below that the fiber ribbons coming out of the OEs need to be routed through the fiber cassettes to manage the fiber properly. FAUs are detachable to provision for breakages that need replacing. But the more complicated routing of fiber within the switch means that fiber/FAU replacement is far more onerous than replacing a broken pluggable transceiver which is simply a hot swap at the front of the face plate. In the case of the CPO switch, the engineer will need to go inside the box/chassis, remove the broken FAU, and then properly re-attach the new FAU through the cassette. This needs to be done without disturbing the other fibers. While Nvidia has been emphasizing the reliability benefits of CPO, serviceability is another element that is worth discussing at more length.

FAUs are detachable to provision for breakages that need replacing. But the more complicated routing of fiber within the switch means that fiber/FAU replacement is far more onerous than replacing a broken pluggable transceiver which is simply a hot swap at the front of the face plate. In the case of the CPO switch, the engineer will need to go inside the box/chassis, remove the broken FAU, and then properly re-attach the new FAU through the cassette. This needs to be done without disturbing the other fibers. While Nvidia has been emphasizing the reliability benefits of CPO, serviceability is another element that is worth discussing at more length.

pro.text: 从下方Quantum-X CPO交换机的特写图像中可以看出，从光引擎（Optical Engine，OE）引出的光纤带需要通过光纤盒进行布线，以实现对光纤的妥善管理。FAU可拆卸，以便更换需要维修的损坏部件。但交换机内部更为复杂的光纤布线意味着，光纤/FAU的更换远比更换损坏的可插拔收发器繁琐，后者只需在面板前端进行热插拔即可。而在CPO交换机的情况下，工程师需要进入机箱内部，移除损坏的FAU，然后通过光纤盒正确重新连接新的FAU。此过程必须在不干扰其他光纤的情况下完成。
